entrypoints.likely_purpose: Configure the verify build lane and activate build-boundary checks.
entrypoints.notes: Best starting point for repo-local build verification.

entrypoints.evidence: Help and headless smoke both succeeded.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Run the compiled client product surface.
entrypoints.notes: Current easiest verified client path is headless or minimal UI smoke.

entrypoints.evidence: Help and headless smoke both succeeded.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Run the compiled authoritative server surface.
entrypoints.notes: Verified surface today is deterministic loopback/headless smoke, not external multiplayer.

entrypoints.evidence: Help succeeded; smoke only showed control hooks/caps state.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Run the compiled launcher wrapper surface.
entrypoints.notes: Practical repo-local launcher control is currently stronger through tools/launcher/launch.py.

entrypoints.evidence: Help succeeded; smoke returned stub status.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Run the compiled setup wrapper surface.
entrypoints.notes: Practical repo-local setup flow is stronger through tools/setup/setup_cli.py.

entrypoints.likely_purpose: Run the compiled tools host surface.
entrypoints.notes: tools_host_main.c still identifies the host as a stub to be replaced by a tool router.

entrypoints.evidence: compat-status, profiles list, packs list, and launcher status all ran.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Launcher AppShell command surface for compat, packs, profiles, and supervisor operations.
entrypoints.notes: Best launcher surface for repo-local audit and likely baseline assembly.

entrypoints.evidence: help, compat-status, profiles list, and packs list all ran.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Setup AppShell command surface for install, trust, update, packs, profiles, and diagnostics.
entrypoints.notes: This is the strongest live setup surface in the repo today.

entrypoints.evidence: Direct help invocation failed with broken repo-root/appshell import resolution.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Server AppShell entrypoint when invoked as a script.
entrypoints.notes: Do not recommend as a baseline command until repo_root_hint is fixed.

entrypoints.evidence: Module invocation still resolved product registry relative to the wrong repo root.
entrypoints.notes: Slightly farther than direct script mode, but still blocked.

entrypoints.evidence: Help works, but local-singleplayer launch attempt fell through to AppShell/TUI rather than a clear gameplay boot.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Legacy or transitional MVP client/server bootstrap wrapper.
entrypoints.notes: Useful as a compatibility wrapper, not yet a dependable playtest command.

entrypoints.evidence: --help succeeded for the FAST command surface.
entrypoints.notes: Useful for governance/test orchestration rather than direct product play.

entrypoints.evidence: Created session artifacts successfully during audit.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Create a session spec and universe artifacts for a save/session.
entrypoints.notes: Works now and is part of the shortest path to a baseline session.

entrypoints.evidence: Help works, but alternate saves-root session boot was blocked by runner save-path coupling.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Boot a created session spec into runtime/server state.
entrypoints.notes: Recommend using canonical saves/<save_id> until the coupling bug is fixed.
run_prerequisites: session artifacts in expected saves layout

entrypoints.evidence: Help works; FAST attempt timed out during audit.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Run unified validation and emit reports.
entrypoints.notes: Exists and is wired, but audit did not finish a full FAST run.

entrypoints.evidence: Help works and exposes FAST/STRICT/FULL profile selection.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Run TestX all-suite across FAST/STRICT/FULL profiles and shards.
entrypoints.notes: Best fit for large validation sweeps once baseline boot is stable.

entrypoints.evidence: CTest enumeration found 493 tests in the verify tree.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Execute registered C/C++ and Python test targets from the verify tree.
entrypoints.notes: Includes playtest, capability, distribution, trust, and performance suites.

entrypoints.evidence: Direct invocation produced accepted handshake and compat payloads during audit.
entrypoints.likely_purpose: Directly start or restart local singleplayer through the loopback controller.
entrypoints.notes: Internal path is more functional today than the public CLI wrapper.

observed_commands.summary: Configure completed and wrote build files to out/build/vs2026/verify.
Compiled client binary is present and prints help.
Client smoke emitted deterministic MP0 hash 16976973710109906564.
Compiled server binary is present and prints help.
Server smoke emitted deterministic MP0 loopback hash 16976973710109906564.
Compiled launcher binary is present and prints help.
Launcher smoke ran but only exposed control hooks and caps state, not a session boot.
Compiled setup binary is present and prints help.
Setup smoke returned `setup status: ok (stub)` rather than a full install flow.
Tools smoke returned `tools_smoke=ok`.
Launcher AppShell reported compat.full, release_manifest.json present, and repo_wrapper_shim install discovery.
Supervisor status surfaced prior client/server process state, including a server child exit_code 3 and failed attach attempt.
Launcher enumerated profile.bundle.mvp_default.
Launcher enumerated live pack manifests; audit counted 42 pack.json files under packs/.
Setup AppShell reported compat.full, release manifest present, and repo_wrapper_shim install discovery.
Setup AppShell enumerated the default profile bundle.
Setup AppShell enumerated live pack manifests.
Direct script invocation failed because REPO_ROOT_HINT escapes the repo root and breaks appshell import resolution.
Module invocation progressed farther but still resolved the repo root incorrectly and failed to find data/registries/product_registry.json.
Session creation wrote session_spec.json, universe_identity.json, universe_state.json, and universe_contract_bundle.json.
Boot failed because runner.py hard-codes repo_root/saves/<save_id> instead of honoring the alternate saves root used by session_create.
TestX all-suite entrypoint is present and exposes FAST/STRICT/FULL profiles and shard selection.
Unified validation was attempted but did not finish inside the audit timeout window, so the audit does not claim a green FAST gate.
CTest enumerated 493 registered tests in the verify tree, including playtest, capability, distribution, trust, and performance suites.
The public MVP bootstrap did not yield a clear gameplay launch and instead dropped into the AppShell/TUI command surface.
Direct controller invocation produced a large accepted loopback handshake and compat payloads, but the public wrapper remains unclear.
